entity.summary: Onchain margin-based yield and funding-rate exchange by Pendle that lets traders speculate on, hedge, and lock fixed rates against floating perpetual-market funding streams.
entity.notes: Current first-party Pendle documentation and application pages describe Boros as a fully onchain order-book venue for margin-based funding-rate and yield trading, with long, short, hedge, and basis-trade workflows. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, fees, revenue, TVL, and open interest. Geographic access restrictions visible in the current application do not establish a global shutdown or terminal state. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Boros Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Boros as a margin-based yield-trading platform that supports funding-rate markets, fixed-versus-floating positions, hedging, and arbitrage strategies through onchain market infrastructure.

evidence.title: Boros protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day trading volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
